c0.description: BytePlus fast route: Seed 2.0 Lite for low-latency, low-cost simple text tasks.

c1.description: BytePlus balanced route: Seed 2.0 Lite for normal agent work with provider thinking available.

c2.description: BytePlus strong route: Seed 2.0 Lite with medium thinking for multi-step text tasks.

c3.description: BytePlus highest route: Seed 2.0 Lite with high thinking for harder long-horizon text tasks.

c0.description: DashScope fast route: Qwen3.6 Flash for simple text tasks; pending live smoke.

c1.description: DashScope balanced route: Qwen3.6 Plus for normal agent and coding work; pending live smoke.

c2.description: DashScope strong route: Qwen3 Max for complex text tasks.

c3.description: DashScope highest route: Qwen3 Max; higher-thinking behavior requires future payload support.

c0.description: DeepSeek fast route: V4 Flash with no router-requested thinking; request ID pending live smoke.

c1.description: DeepSeek balanced route: V4 Flash with thinking enabled; request ID pending live smoke.

c2.description: DeepSeek strong route: V4 Pro with thinking enabled; request ID pending live smoke.

c3.description: DeepSeek highest route: same V4 Pro wire behavior until effort-level support is added.

c0.description: Gemini fast route: 2.5 Flash-Lite for low-latency tasks.

c1.description: Gemini balanced route: 2.5 Flash for normal agent work.

c2.description: Gemini strong route: 2.5 Pro for complex coding and reasoning.

c3.description: Gemini highest route: 2.5 Pro with high thinking; 3.1 preview remains opt-in.

c0.description: Moonshot fast route: Kimi K2.5 for cost-efficient agent work with 256K context.

c1.description: Moonshot balanced route: Kimi K2.5 for normal multimodal agent work.

c2.description: Moonshot strong route: Kimi K2.6 for complex coding, reasoning, and multimodal tasks.

c3.description: Moonshot highest route: Kimi K2.6 for the hardest long-horizon agent work.

c0.description: OpenAI fast route: GPT-5.4 Nano for fast, high-throughput simple work.

c1.description: OpenAI balanced route: GPT-5.4 Mini for normal agent work.

c2.description: OpenAI strong route: GPT-5.5 for complex text tasks.

c3.description: OpenAI highest route: GPT-5.5 with high reasoning; GPT-5.5 Pro is excluded because it is not streaming-compatible.

c0.description: fast DeepSeek V4 Flash route for trivial chat, short rewrites, extraction, and low-risk simple Q&A

c1.description: default balanced text model for normal agent work, coding assistance, debugging, and moderate analysis

c2.description: stronger GLM 5.2 route for multi-step coding, structured reasoning, larger context synthesis, and harder analysis

c3.description: Highest-tier GLM 5.2 route for difficult planning, deep review, complex debugging, and high-stakes synthesis

image_model.description: Image model: vision-capable route for user-supplied image attachments, screenshots, diagrams, and visual question answering

c0.description: Volcengine fast route: Doubao Seed 2.0 Mini for low-latency, low-cost simple text tasks.

c1.description: Volcengine balanced route: Doubao Seed 2.0 Lite for daily agent work with lower cost than Pro.

c2.description: Volcengine strong route: Doubao Seed 2.0 Pro for complex reasoning and multimodal-capable text work.

c3.description: Volcengine highest route: Doubao Seed 2.0 Code Preview for the hardest coding and code-review routes.

c0.description: Zhipu fast route: GLM-4.7 FlashX for simple text tasks; live smoke may require fallback.

c1.description: Zhipu balanced route: GLM-5 for normal agent work.

c2.description: Zhipu strong route: GLM-5.1 for complex text tasks.

c3.description: Zhipu highest route: GLM-5.1 with high reasoning effort.
